name: Ankle MRI
description: MRI of the ankle for evaluation of ligaments, tendons, and joint pathology

findings.technique: MRI of the ankle was performed in multiple planes including T1, T2, PD, and STIR sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Anterior Talofibular Ligament
sections.content: The ATFL demonstrates [intact / no tear / no sprain]. The ligament is [taut / normal]

sections.name: Calcaneofibular Ligament
sections.content: The CFL demonstrates [intact / no tear / no sprain]. The ligament is [taut / normal]

sections.name: Posterior Talofibular Ligament
sections.content: The PTFL demonstrates [intact / no tear / no sprain]. The ligament is [taut / normal]

sections.name: Deltoid Ligament
sections.content: The deltoid ligament complex demonstrates [intact / no tear / no sprain]. No medial ankle instability.

sections.name: Achilles Tendon
sections.content: The Achilles tendon demonstrates [no tear / no thickening / no tendinopathy]. The tendon is [intact / normal]

sections.name: Posterior Tibialis Tendon
sections.content: The posterior tibialis tendon demonstrates [intact / no tear / no subluxation]. No tenosynovitis.

sections.name: Ankle Joint
sections.content: The ankle joint demonstrates [no effusion / no osteochondral lesion / no cartilage defect]. No joint effusion.

sections.name: Bone
sections.content: The talus, calcaneus, and tibia demonstrate [no fracture / no bone bruise / no osteochondral lesion].

impression:
1. Normal ankle MRI.
2. No ligamentous injury, tendon tear, or osteochondral lesion identified.
author: RadReport Templates
